intro: Tragacantha lyallii, also known as New Zealand spiny saltbush, is a shrub-like plant native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the management of conditions such as arthritis and cardiovascular disease. Bioactive constituents of Tragacantha lyallii include flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
